name: text
text: Primary rat cortical cultures  |  DIV1 / DIV2 / DIV2 + Netrin-1  |  bulk RNA-seq
textPreview: Primary rat cortical cultures  |  DIV1 / DIV2 / DIV2 + Netrin-1  |  bulk RNA-seq

text: 开场：这是一版组会 result update，不是完整答辩。重点讲目前 RNA-seq 分析已经完成到哪里、最关键结果是什么、以及下一步实验/分析怎么推进。

name: subtitle
text: The main Netrin contrast, developmental context, and cell-source interpretation are all ready for discussion.
textPreview: The main Netrin contrast, developmental context, and cell-source interpretation are all ready for discussion.

name: claim-body
text: QC / PCA; C1 Netrin vs DIV2 DEG + GSEA; C2 DIV2 vs DIV1 DEG + ORA + GSEA; heatmaps; cell-type marker analysis.
textPreview: QC / PCA; C1 Netrin vs DIV2 DEG + GSEA; C2 DIV2 vs DIV1 DEG + ORA + GSEA; heatmaps; cell-type marker analysis.

name: claim-body
text: Netrin-1 produces a focused bidirectional response: synapse / axon-guidance programs rise while cell-cycle / progenitor programs fall.
textPreview: Netrin-1 produces a focused bidirectional response: synapse / axon-guidance programs rise while cell-cycle / progenitor programs fall.

name: claim-body
text: Bulk mixed culture means top single-gene hits must be interpreted with cell-source guardrails, especially microglia and oligodendrocyte markers.
textPreview: Bulk mixed culture means top single-gene hits must be interpreted with cell-source guardrails, especially microglia and oligodendrocyte m...

text: 状态页。直接告诉大家：这次不是还在做 QC，而是主结果已经形成。要讨论的不是有没有信号，而是如何解释这个信号，尤其是 bulk mixed culture 的细胞来源问题。

name: slide-title
text: Two contrasts answer two different questions.
textPreview: Two contrasts answer two different questions.

name: subtitle
text: C1 is the treatment result; C2 provides developmental scale and context.
textPreview: C1 is the treatment result; C2 provides developmental scale and context.

name: claim-body
text:
DIV2 + Netrin-1 vs DIV2
Primary biological question.
textPreview: DIV2 + Netrin-1 vs DIV2 | Primary biological question.

name: claim-body
text:
DIV2 vs DIV1
Scale and composition context.
textPreview: DIV2 vs DIV1 | Scale and composition context.

name: text
text: DESeq2 model: ~ batch + condition; batch correction only for visualization.
textPreview: DESeq2 model: ~ batch + condition; batch correction only for visualization.

text: 设计页。C1 是 Netrin treatment effect；C2 是 DIV1 到 DIV2 的 24 小时发育/vehicle 背景。统计模型里 batch 作为协变量，校正矩阵只用作 PCA 和 heatmap 可视化。

name: slide-title
text: The dataset is clean enough for contrast-level interpretation.
textPreview: The dataset is clean enough for contrast-level interpretation.

name: subtitle
text: High sample correlation and PCA separation support downstream analysis.
textPreview: High sample correlation and PCA separation support downstream analysis.

name: text
text: After visual batch correction, Netrin separates on PC2
textPreview: After visual batch correction, Netrin separates on PC2

text: QC 只讲结论：样本相关性高，没有 outlier；PCA 校正后能看到 DIV2 与 DIV2+Netrin 在 PC2 分开，说明主对比有可见信号。

name: text
text: Netrin-1 response is focused and bidirectional.
textPreview: Netrin-1 response is focused and bidirectional.

name: text
text: Primary contrast: DIV2 + Netrin-1 vs DIV2 control.
textPreview: Primary contrast: DIV2 + Netrin-1 vs DIV2 control.

text: 过渡页。下面进入 C1 主结果。

name: slide-title
text: Netrin-1 changes a small, high-confidence gene set.
textPreview: Netrin-1 changes a small, high-confidence gene set.

name: text
text:
Top up: C3 (+2.54, padj 1.6e-20)
Top down: Olig1 (-1.00, padj 3.3e-14)
textPreview: Top up: C3 (+2.54, padj 1.6e-20) | Top down: Olig1 (-1.00, padj 3.3e-14)

text: 火山图：C1 的 DEG 数量不大，STRICT 只有 25 个，7 上调 18 下调；RELAXED 66 个。结论是 focused response，不是全转录组大重塑。

name: slide-title
text: The strongest genes are biologically informative, but not all neuron-intrinsic.
textPreview: The strongest genes are biologically informative, but not all neuron-intrinsic.

name: subtitle
text: This is where cell-source interpretation becomes necessary.
textPreview: This is where cell-source interpretation becomes necessary.

name: claim-body
text:
C3, Apoe, Adgre1, Ncf1, Itgal, Acod1
Immune / microglial signature.
textPreview: C3, Apoe, Adgre1, Ncf1, Itgal, Acod1 | Immune / microglial signature.

name: claim-body
text:
Olig1, Olig2, Sparcl1, Ccnd1, Id1/3
OPC / glial / progenitor-linked signature.
textPreview: Olig1, Olig2, Sparcl1, Ccnd1, Id1/3 | OPC / glial / progenitor-linked signature.

text: 这页讲单基因模块。免疫相关基因上调，Olig/progenitor/glial 相关基因下调。重点提醒：这些 top gene 不是全都神经元内在信号，所以后面必须用 GSEA 和 marker 分析来归因。

name: slide-title
text: Gene-set analysis reveals the neuronal program beneath the top genes.
textPreview: Gene-set analysis reveals the neuronal program beneath the top genes.

name: subtitle
text: Synaptic and axon-guidance programs rise; cell-cycle programs fall.
textPreview: Synaptic and axon-guidance programs rise; cell-cycle programs fall.

name: text
text: GO BP: 481 significant terms (255 activated / 226 suppressed)
textPreview: GO BP: 481 significant terms (255 activated / 226 suppressed)

alt: GO BP GSEA barplot for Netrin

text: GSEA 是主结论。虽然单个 DEG 不多，但全排序显示突触、axon guidance、exocytosis、learning/memory 上调；cell cycle、DNA replication、chromosome segregation 下调。

name: subtitle
text: The result is bidirectional tuning, not simple maturation acceleration.
textPreview: The result is bidirectional tuning, not simple maturation acceleration.

name: text
text:
GO axon guidance NES +1.85
KEGG axon guidance NES +1.72
Synapse assembly NES +2.05
textPreview: GO axon guidance NES +1.85 | KEGG axon guidance NES +1.72 | Synapse assembly NES +2.05

name: text
text:
KEGG Cell cycle NES -2.70
DNA replication / repair suppressed
Olig1/Olig2/Ccnd1 down
textPreview: KEGG Cell cycle NES -2.70 | DNA replication / repair suppressed | Olig1/Olig2/Ccnd1 down

name: claim-body
text: Netrin-1 appears to coordinate subtle neuronal pathway activation while suppressing proliferative/progenitor-associated programs.
textPreview: Netrin-1 appears to coordinate subtle neuronal pathway activation while suppressing proliferative/progenitor-associated programs.

text: 模型页：把 C1 解释成 two-module response。上调端是神经元功能通路，尤其 axon guidance 跨 GO/KEGG 收敛；下调端是 cell cycle/progenitor。不要说简单加速成熟，要说 bidirectional tuning。

name: slide-title
text: Trajectory patterns argue against a simple acceleration story.
textPreview: Trajectory patterns argue against a simple acceleration story.

name: subtitle
text: P1 monotonic-up genes are absent; the dominant pattern reflects DIV2 peak then Netrin reversal.
textPreview: P1 monotonic-up genes are absent; the dominant pattern reflects DIV2 peak then Netrin reversal.

name: text
text: Important: Olig1/Olig2 are glial-lineage markers; P5 should not be over-read as neuron-intrinsic maturation.
textPreview: Important: Olig1/Olig2 are glial-lineage markers; P5 should not be over-read as neuron-intrinsic maturation.

text: Pattern 页强调阴性结果：P1=0，没有基因沿 DIV1→DIV2→Netrin 单调上升。P5 最大，但 Olig1/Olig2 是胶质/OPC marker，所以不能直接说神经元成熟被加速。

name: text
text: The 24 h developmental contrast gives scale and context.
textPreview: The 24 h developmental contrast gives scale and context.

text: 进入 C2。C2 不是主问题，但帮助理解 24 小时背景和细胞组成变化。

name: slide-title
text: Development dominates the transcriptome relative to Netrin treatment.
textPreview: Development dominates the transcriptome relative to Netrin treatment.

name: subtitle
text: The secondary contrast is much larger than the primary contrast.
textPreview: The secondary contrast is much larger than the primary contrast.

name: text
text: Olig1: +3.37 in C2 but -1.00 in C1, suggesting Netrin reverses part of natural induction.
textPreview: Olig1: +3.37 in C2 but -1.00 in C1, suggesting Netrin reverses part of natural induction.

text: C2 火山图：STRICT 1495，RELAXED 4636，比 C1 大得多。这个对比说明发育/时间效应是主轴。Olig1 在 C2 上调但在 C1 下调，支持 Netrin 不是沿发育方向简单推进。

name: slide-title
text: DIV2 activates mature neuronal programs and suppresses precursor programs.
textPreview: DIV2 activates mature neuronal programs and suppresses precursor programs.

name: subtitle
text: GSEA and ORA agree on the developmental interpretation.
textPreview: GSEA and ORA agree on the developmental interpretation.

name: text
text: GO BP: 534 significant terms (410 activated / 124 suppressed)
textPreview: GO BP: 534 significant terms (410 activated / 124 suppressed)

alt: GO BP GSEA DIV2 vs DIV1

text: C2 pathway 页。DIV2 富集突触传递、递质转运、可塑性、GABA/glutamate synapse；DIV1 富集染色质、核糖体、DNA 修复等前体程序。这是合理的发育成熟背景。

name: slide-title
text: Heatmaps show development is the dominant expression axis.
textPreview: Heatmaps show development is the dominant expression axis.

name: subtitle
text: DIV1 separates from both DIV2 states; Netrin is a smaller perturbation within DIV2.
textPreview: DIV1 separates from both DIV2 states; Netrin is a smaller perturbation within DIV2.

text: 热图页：DIV1 独立，DIV2 与 DIV2+Netrin 更接近。说明发育主导整体结构，Netrin 是在 DIV2 状态上的较小扰动。

name: text
text: Cell-type marker analysis changes how we read the bulk signal.
textPreview: Cell-type marker analysis changes how we read the bulk signal.

text: 进入细胞来源分析。这里是组会上最值得讨论的部分。

name: slide-title
text: C2 contains a strong composition shift.
textPreview: C2 contains a strong composition shift.

name: subtitle
text: Macroglia / OPC markers rise; microglia markers fall; neuronal markers are relatively stable.
textPreview: Macroglia / OPC markers rise; microglia markers fall; neuronal markers are relatively stable.

name: claim-body
text: Many developmental DEGs likely reflect composition changes in mixed culture, not only neuron-intrinsic maturation.
textPreview: Many developmental DEGs likely reflect composition changes in mixed culture, not only neuron-intrinsic maturation.

name: text
text: No AraC mixed culture: marker behavior is inference, not direct cell counting.
textPreview: No AraC mixed culture: marker behavior is inference, not direct cell counting.

text: C2 marker 图：macroglia/OPC 和 astrocyte 相关 marker 上升，microglia marker 下降，neuron marker 近似稳定。这个结果提示 C2 的大量 DEG 包含细胞组成变化。

name: slide-title
text: C1 does not show the same composition collapse.
textPreview: C1 does not show the same composition collapse.

name: subtitle
text: Microglial effect genes rise, while identity markers are mostly trends with wide uncertainty.
textPreview: Microglial effect genes rise, while identity markers are mostly trends with wide uncertainty.

name: claim-body
text: Immune genes are consistent with microglial activation, but identity markers do not prove a large increase in microglia number.
textPreview: Immune genes are consistent with microglial activation, but identity markers do not prove a large increase in microglia number.

name: text
text: Preferred wording: “consistent with microglial activation,” not “Netrin directly activates microglia.”
textPreview: Preferred wording: “consistent with microglial activation,” not “Netrin directly activates microglia.”

text: C1 marker 图：效应基因如 C3/Apoe 等显著，但 microglia 身份 marker 多为趋势并且误差大。因此最好说 consistent with microglial activation，而不是直接说 Netrin activates microglia。

name: slide-title
text: Netrin-1 has a direct neuronal axis and an indirect/source-limited immune axis.
textPreview: Netrin-1 has a direct neuronal axis and an indirect/source-limited immune axis.

name: subtitle
text: This framing keeps the result strong without over-claiming causality.
textPreview: This framing keeps the result strong without over-claiming causality.

name: text
text: Use neuronal pathways as the confident axis; treat immune signals as source-limited.
textPreview: Use neuronal pathways as the confident axis; treat immune signals as source-limited.

text: 工作模型页。神经元轴最可靠：受体丰富，axon guidance/synapse 通路上调。免疫轴是真实信号，但来源和因果有限，可能是神经元介导的间接 microglia activation。

name: subtitle
text: The two contrasts have different scale and direction balance.
textPreview: The two contrasts have different scale and direction balance.

name: text
text: C1 is balanced and bidirectional; C2 is activation-skewed. This supports Netrin as tuning rather than broad developmental acceleration.
textPreview: C1 is balanced and bidirectional; C2 is activation-skewed. This supports Netrin as tuning rather than broad developmental acceleration.

text: 整合页。C1 的 GO/KEGG 基本双向平衡；C2 明显偏激活。这一页把主结论落稳：development 是大规模 activation，Netrin 是双向微调。

name: subtitle
text: The result is mature enough to decide the next validation experiments.
textPreview: The result is mature enough to decide the next validation experiments.

name: claim-body
text: Netrin-1 produces a focused 24 h transcriptional response: 25 strict DEGs, 66 relaxed DEGs.
textPreview: Netrin-1 produces a focused 24 h transcriptional response: 25 strict DEGs, 66 relaxed DEGs.

name: claim-body
text: GSEA reveals two coordinated modules: synapse / axon guidance up, cell-cycle / progenitor down.
textPreview: GSEA reveals two coordinated modules: synapse / axon guidance up, cell-cycle / progenitor down.

name: claim-body
text: Cell-type markers show why bulk interpretation must separate direct neuronal and indirect microglial signals.
textPreview: Cell-type markers show why bulk interpretation must separate direct neuronal and indirect microglial signals.

name: claim-body
text: Prioritize: scRNA-seq or sorted populations; IHC for microglia/composition; receptor perturbation; LPS/TLR controls.
textPreview: Prioritize: scRNA-seq or sorted populations; IHC for microglia/composition; receptor perturbation; LPS/TLR controls.

name: text
text: Group discussion prompt: which validation path is the fastest route to a defensible mechanism?
textPreview: Group discussion prompt: which validation path is the fastest route to a defensible mechanism?

text: 最后页。建议把讨论引向下一步：如果资源有限，哪个验证路线最快把模型变成机制？单细胞/分选解决来源，IHC 验证 marker，受体扰动验证直接依赖，LPS/TLR 控制排除免疫污染。

name: text
text: ORA and heatmap evidence kept at the end.
textPreview: ORA and heatmap evidence kept at the end.

text: 备份页开始。正式组会可以不讲，问到 ORA 或热图细节时再用。

name: slide-title
text: ORA confirms neuronal maturation up and immune/progenitor programs down.
textPreview: ORA confirms neuronal maturation up and immune/progenitor programs down.

name: subtitle
text: Strict DEG input; GO terms simplified at cutoff 0.7.
textPreview: Strict DEG input; GO terms simplified at cutoff 0.7.

text: 备份 ORA GO。输入是 C2 strict DEG 的 entrez 子集：up 985、down 356；GO simplify 后 up 160、down 91。

name: slide-title
text: KEGG ORA provides pathway-level context for development.
textPreview: KEGG ORA provides pathway-level context for development.

name: subtitle
text: Disease-named KEGG terms are interpreted as shared immune machinery, not disease states.
textPreview: Disease-named KEGG terms are interpreted as shared immune machinery, not disease states.

text: 备份 KEGG ORA。注意 KEGG disease-name caveat：不是疾病状态，而是共享免疫/补体/感染相关机制。

name: slide-title
text: The two-module structure is visible in both corrected and raw VST views.
textPreview: The two-module structure is visible in both corrected and raw VST views.

name: subtitle
text: Batch correction is visualization-only; statistical testing remains on original counts.
textPreview: Batch correction is visualization-only; statistical testing remains on original counts.

text: 备份 C1 heatmap。可用于回答 batch correction 影响；主图和 raw VST 都能看到两模块结构。
